# FP Conglomerate

FP Conglomerate is a multi-sector parent group focused on trusted service delivery across Africa. The group coordinates independent business units under shared standards for integrity, excellence, and accountability.

## Business units

- Ordained Believers Army (OBA) — faith, ministry, and outreach
- Anate Grand Empire Solutions (AGE) — movie production, construction, transport, devices, and general appliances
- Boys Sterling Company Limited (BSC) — real estate, hospitality, counseling, construction, and building maintenance
- Mogadishu Initiative Response (MIA) — humanitarian programs, shelter, education, and social justice support

## Main site paths (same origin)

- / — Home
- /about — About the group
- /business-units — All business units
- /services — Service areas overview
- /gallery — Gallery
- /blog — Blog and news
- /careers — Careers
- /faq — Frequently asked questions
- /contact — Contact

## Admin (separate app)

Content editing runs as a separate deployment (not on these public paths). Do not assume /admin exists on the marketing site.
